active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

evidence: src/memoryos_lite/public_maintenance_planner.py builds proposal shape from ModelVisiblePlannerInput only.
tests/test_public_benchmarks.py::test_planner_eval_sidecar_does_not_change_proposal_shape passed after failing before the repair.
src/memoryos_lite/agent_tool_selection.py converts selector/provider exceptions into fallback tool_selection_denied.
tests/test_agent_kernel.py::test_kernel_selector_unavailable_fails_closed_without_policy_or_mutation passed after failing before the repair.

rejected_findings.summary: The first review asked to restore .hermes-loop/state.json and remove .hermes-loop/active_job.json.
rejected_findings.reason: The phase bootstrap rule required moving GOD_DISPATCH to EXECUTE once context_bundle.md, god_dispatch.json, and plan_final.md already existed for phase-15. .hermes-loop/active_job.json is an untracked runtime artifact outside phase implementation scope.

review_eval_decision.reason: Phase 15 changed the opt-in kernel selection boundary and additive public report artifacts only. Default retrieval, context composition, answer projection, judge behavior, and public scoring were not broadened, so a milestone LongMemEval plus LoCoMo full-chain judge run is not required for this structural phase ACK.

longmemeval.reason: No default LongMemEval retrieval, context, answer, judge, or scoring behavior changed; LongMemEval-only evidence would not satisfy this phase.

locomo.reason: Planner report artifacts are in scope; a fixed no-LLM LoCoMo structural replay verifies additive report shape, sidecar separation, and non-execution.
